description: A client wants to open an investment account for their minor child.

nodes.task_description: Explain the features and rules of a custodial account to the client.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly explains that the gift is irrevocable and the child gets control at the age of majority.

nodes.task_description: Collect the required information for both the custodian (the client) and the minor.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent accurately captures all personal details for both individuals.

nodes.task_description: Create the new custodial account in the system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully opens the new UTMA account.
